linkedinEmail.title: LinkedIn Email
linkedinEmail.description: Your LinkedIn account email address used to authenticate.

linkedinPassword.title: LinkedIn Password
linkedinPassword.description: Your LinkedIn account password. Stored securely and never logged.

salesNavigatorUrl.title: Sales Navigator Search URL
salesNavigatorUrl.description: The full Sales Navigator search URL to scrape (e.g. https://www.linkedin.com/sales/search/people?...).

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of profiles to scrape (1–2500). Default: 100.
